name: Aztec Pyramid Avocado Dip
recipeIngredient: 3 California avocados (dark skinned), peeled and pitted
recipeInstructions:
1. Use the 3 peeled and pitted avocados.
2. Mash the avocados and blend in the lemon juice, mixing well. Spread evenly in a bowl or serving plate to the edges of the dish.
3. Beat the cream cheese until smooth and creamy. Blend in the sour cream, then blend in the taco seasoning mix, ensuring it's well combined. Spread over the avocado layer.
4. Sprinkle the shredded cheddar cheese over the cream cheese mixture.
5. Distribute the finely chopped tomatoes over the cheddar cheese layer.
6. Scatter the sliced green onions over the tomato layer.
7. Top with the sliced black olives.
8. Serve at room temperature.
Makes about 10 1/2 cups of dip.
Suggested dippers: Tortilla chips, bell peppers, lobster, jicama
